summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-19 (compact layout), REQ-21 (toggle Check In/Check Out button with timestamps), and REQ-20 (combined datetime values passed to PDF). REQ-21's toggle button supersedes REQ-20's input controls, but both are addressed. The pdfGenerator.ts is updated with checkInDateTime/checkOutDateTime ISO strings. All acceptance criteria appear met across the modified files.

hallucinated_features.description: Duration preview between Check In and Check Out timestamps
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions 'shows duration preview' in ReportForm.tsx, which was not requested in any of the three requirements.
